profile.name: João Vitor
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.bio: Building elegant solutions with modern web technologies. Passionate about clean code, performance, and great user experiences.

about: I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for creating beautiful, performant web applications. With expertise in React, TypeScript, and Node.js, I focus on building solutions that make a real impact. I believe in clean code, comprehensive testing, and continuous learning.

experience.description: Led development of multiple full-stack applications using React and Node.js. Mentored junior developers and established coding standards for the team.
Built and maintained web applications for SaaS platform. Worked on features spanning frontend and backend systems.
Developed responsive web interfaces for various clients. Focused on performance optimization and accessibility standards.

projects.title: Portfolio V2
projects.description: Modern, minimalist developer portfolio with dark mode support and GitHub contribution graph integration.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Full-stack task management application with real-time synchronization and collaboration features.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Data visualization dashboard with interactive charts and real-time updates for business metrics.
